cases.name: read_snapshot_legacy_reader_modern_writer_2_7_succeeds
cases.description: Reading a valid (2,7) table with no writer features succeeds.

cases.name: read_snapshot_3_7_empty_features_succeeds
cases.description: Reading a valid (3,7) table with empty readerFeatures and writerFeatures succeeds.

cases.name: read_snapshot_modern_reader_legacy_writer_3_5_missing_reader_features_fails
cases.description: Reading a (3,5) table omitting readerFeatures fails; minReaderVersion=3 requires readerFeatures to be present in the protocol action.

cases.name: read_snapshot_modern_reader_legacy_writer_3_5_fails
cases.description: Reading a (3,5) table with readerFeatures present fails; (3,5) is a structurally invalid version pair.

cases.name: read_snapshot_3_7_missing_writer_features_fails
cases.description: Reading an invalid (3,7) table omitting writerFeatures fails.

cases.name: read_snapshot_2_7_with_reader_features_present_fails
cases.description: Reading an invalid (2,7) table with readerFeatures present.

cases.name: create_table_reader_v3_writer_v5_fails
cases.description: Creating an invalid table with (3,5) fails: minReaderVersion=3 requires minWriterVersion=7.

cases.name: read_snapshot_unknown_reader_feature_fails
cases.description: Reading a table with an unknown entry in readerFeatures fails.

cases.name: read_snapshot_unknown_writer_feature_succeeds
cases.description: Reading a table with an unknown entry in writerFeatures only succeeds: readers need not understand writer-only features.

cases.name: empty_commit_unknown_writer_feature_fails
cases.description: Writing to a table with an unknown entry in writerFeatures fails.

cases.name: read_snapshot_reader_writer_feature_only_in_reader_features_fails
cases.description: Reading a table with deletionVectors in readerFeatures but not writerFeatures fails: listing a feature only in readerFeatures is forbidden.

cases.name: read_snapshot_reader_writer_feature_only_in_writer_features_fails
cases.description: Reading a table with deletionVectors in writerFeatures but not readerFeatures fails: reader-writer features must appear in both lists.

cases.name: read_snapshot_protocol_version_too_high_fails
cases.description: Reading a table with minReaderVersion=999 fails: readers reject unsupported protocol versions.

cases.name: read_snapshot_high_writer_version_only_succeeds
cases.description: Reading a table with a supported minReaderVersion but unsupported minWriterVersion=999 succeeds: readers check only the reader version.

cases.name: empty_commit_high_writer_version_only_fails
cases.description: Writing to a table with minWriterVersion=999 fails even if the reader version is supported.

cases.name: create_table_3_7_empty_features_succeeds
cases.description: Creating a valid (3,7) table with empty readerFeatures and writerFeatures succeeds.

cases.name: create_table_legacy_reader_modern_writer_2_7_succeeds
cases.description: Creating a valid (2,7) table with empty writerFeatures succeeds.

cases.name: create_table_high_writer_version_only_fails
cases.description: Creating a table with a supported minReaderVersion but unsupported minWriterVersion=999 fails: writers do not commit unsupported protocol versions.

cases.name: create_table_protocol_version_too_high_fails
cases.description: Creating a table with minReaderVersion=999 fails: writers do not commit unsupported protocol versions.

cases.name: empty_commit_3_7_empty_features_succeeds
cases.description: Appending to a valid (3,7) table with empty readerFeatures and writerFeatures succeeds.

cases.name: empty_commit_legacy_reader_modern_writer_2_7_succeeds
cases.description: Appending to a valid (2,7) table with no writer features succeeds.

cases.name: create_table_3_7_missing_writer_features_fails
cases.description: Creating a table with (3,7) but no writerFeatures key fails: writerFeatures is required when minWriterVersion=7.

cases.name: create_table_3_7_missing_reader_features_fails
cases.description: Creating a table with (3,7) but no readerFeatures key fails: readerFeatures is required when minReaderVersion=3.

cases.name: create_table_2_7_with_reader_features_present_fails
cases.description: Creating a table with (2,7) and readerFeatures present fails: readerFeatures is only valid when minReaderVersion=3.

cases.name: empty_commit_3_7_missing_writer_features_fails
cases.description: Appending to a (3,7) table missing the writerFeatures key fails.

cases.name: empty_commit_2_7_with_reader_features_present_fails
cases.description: Appending to a (2,7) table with readerFeatures present fails: the table is in an invalid protocol state.

cases.name: empty_commit_modern_reader_legacy_writer_3_5_fails
cases.description: Appending to a (3,5) table fails; (3,5) is a structurally invalid version pair.

cases.name: create_table_unknown_reader_feature_fails
cases.description: Creating a table listing an unknown reader feature fails: writers do not commit unknown reader features.

cases.name: create_table_unknown_writer_feature_fails
cases.description: Creating a table listing an unknown writer feature fails: writers do not commit unknown writer features.

cases.name: empty_commit_unknown_reader_feature_fails
cases.description: Writing to a table with an unknown reader feature fails.

cases.name: create_table_reader_writer_feature_only_in_reader_features_fails
cases.description: Creating a table with deletionVectors in readerFeatures but not writerFeatures fails: reader-writer features appear in both lists.

cases.name: create_table_reader_writer_feature_only_in_writer_features_fails
cases.description: Creating a table with deletionVectors in writerFeatures but not readerFeatures fails: reader-writer features appear in both lists.

cases.name: empty_commit_reader_writer_feature_only_in_reader_features_fails
cases.description: Writing to a table with deletionVectors in readerFeatures but not writerFeatures fails.

cases.name: create_table_legacy_1_2_with_writer_features_present_fails
cases.description: Creating a (1,2) table with writerFeatures present fails; writerFeatures only exists when minWriterVersion=7.

cases.name: create_table_3_7_unknown_writer_feature_only_fails
cases.description: Creating a (3,7) table with an unknown feature in writerFeatures only fails; writers must not commit features they do not implement.

cases.name: empty_commit_reader_writer_feature_only_in_writer_features_fails
cases.description: Writing to a table with deletionVectors in writerFeatures but not readerFeatures fails.

cases.name: nullable_false_legacy_1_1_create_table_succeeds
cases.description: Creating a (1,1) table with a nullable=false column succeeds: no constraint feature exists at writer version 1.

cases.name: nullable_false_without_constraint_feature_modern_create_table_fails
cases.description: Creating a (3,7) table with a nullable=false column but no constraint feature in writerFeatures fails.

cases.name: nullable_false_with_invariants_feature_empty_commit_succeeds
cases.description: Appending to a (3,7)+[invariants] table with a nullable=false column succeeds.

cases.name: read_snapshot_3_7_missing_reader_features_fails
cases.description: Reading a (3,7) table with writerFeatures present but no readerFeatures key fails: readerFeatures is required when minReaderVersion=3.

cases.name: empty_commit_3_7_missing_reader_features_fails
cases.description: Appending to a (3,7) table with writerFeatures present but no readerFeatures key fails: readerFeatures is required when minReaderVersion=3.

cases.name: create_table_2_7_missing_writer_features_fails
cases.description: Creating a table with (2,7) but no writerFeatures key fails: writerFeatures is required when minWriterVersion=7.

cases.name: read_snapshot_2_7_missing_writer_features_fails
cases.description: Reading a (2,7) table with no writerFeatures key fails: writerFeatures is required when minWriterVersion=7.

cases.name: empty_commit_2_7_missing_writer_features_fails
cases.description: Appending to a (2,7) table with no writerFeatures key fails: writerFeatures is required when minWriterVersion=7.

cases.name: read_snapshot_legacy_1_1_succeeds
cases.description: Reading a (1,1) table succeeds; this is the baseline legacy protocol with no table feature lists.

cases.name: empty_commit_legacy_1_1_succeeds
cases.description: Appending to a (1,1) table succeeds; this is the baseline legacy protocol with no table feature lists.
